package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for middleware_contains_business_orchestration: Middleware that performs domain workflows instead of cross-cutting concerns such as auth, tracing, or request enrichment.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule087NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule087NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule087NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario087Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule087NegativeService, input Rule087NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
